actions.rationale: Trim to sub-30%, fund TSM fab chokepoint
Ultimate fab chokepoint for all AI silicon
Optical laser chokepoint intact, thesis unchanged

summary: De-risk optical layer: COHR 40.8%→27.5%, MRVL 32.5%→28.2%, both under 30% soft cap. Add TSM as foundational fab chokepoint—every AI chip, DSP, and laser die flows through TSMC. Correlated optical exposure drops from 67% to 53%. Cash raised to 9.2% within band.
strongest_bear_case: AI hyperscaler capex cycle pauses, optical transceiver inventory builds, InP laser supply catches up to demand crushing COHR/LITE margins, while TSM trades at peak-cycle multiples vulnerable to a cyclical downturn.
